title: Catering and conferences: what Latvia's political parties spend their state financing on
summary_full: When the Saeima was discussing a few years ago whether parties should be allocated more state money, the other Baltic states were cited as an example. They provided funding ten times more generously. Now Latvia has not only caught up with its neighbours, but has even overtaken them.
